programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: Forced to traffic a new drug in her stomach, a woman's life changes when they accidently rupture and unlock her full mind's potential, causing her to evolve into a super human.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: Mari Gilbert's search for her missing daughter, Shannan, uncovers the work of a serial killer on Long Island.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.desc: When a body is stolen from the coroner's van the team stumbles onto a lab performing genetic testing on human hibernation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial killer whose conviction was overturned due to Mac jailing his arresting officer begins killing again, causing Mac to go after him with a vengeance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella becomes a murder suspect in a Philadelphia cold case when Det. Scotty Valens visits the lab and tells her that her DNA matches the evidence.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Tennis legend John McEnroe is suspected of murder, despite a solid alibi, when evidence and witnesses all point to him as the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following the largest drug seizure in New York history, Mac and the CSIs must save the lab and face one of their toughest challenges yet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team find human blood on the crown of the Statue of Liberty, leading them in a race against time to save a famous musician from death at the hands of a vigilante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A dying man confesses to a murder 24 hours before it happens and Mac investigates the possibility of time travel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate a mass murder at the infamous Amityville Horror house. Before Lindsay can close the case, she is warned by someone to leave the house, or she will be in great danger.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a woman shot dead on the steps of the Metropolitan Museum of Art while Mac and Stella investigate the death of a man stabbed to death in Madison Square Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, the CSI team follows the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella finds a box of blood spattered puzzle pieces left on her car, which links to Mac's past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes home to Chicago, trying to solve the mystery of the 333 stalker. Meanwhile, back in New York, the 333 stalker targets the rest of the CSI team.

programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbour Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A hotel owner is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigates the murder of a family court judge who has lots of enemies. Meanwhile, Danny's neighbour Rikki steals his gun to go after the bodega robber who caused her son's death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A badly-burned corpse turns out to belong to an underground street luge racer. The DNA of a man already in prison is found on a dead body discovered in a new high-tech public toilet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are led to an abandoned warehouse where they believe they have found the body of New York's most wanted killer: Suspect X.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella's apartment complex is on fire and she tries to rescue people. After the fire is extinguished, the team finds a dead body inside the building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team inspects a twisted trail of evidence when a saleswoman washes up on Rockaway Beach along with a dead shark.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a guidance counsellor is murdered at a private school, the mayor orders Mac and his team to drop everything to find out what happened.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the search for the 'Cabbie Killer' continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A cab driver is found dead and at first Mac believes they may have found the 'Cabbie Killer', possibly killed by vigilantes. But bodies are still piling up and the killer takes Reed hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man takes hostages during a failed attempt to rob a bank. The man demands a CSI to come in and prove he wasn't the person who fatally shot the bank manager.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Drama following the crime scene investigators in the city of New York. The CSIs embark on a citywide hunt for a violent bank robber who has left a trail of destruction in his wake after fleeing the scene of an audacious heist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI connects two radiation poisoning deaths to a dead librarian and the rare books collection at the New York Public Library.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A fugitive posing as a Federal Air Marshal is found dead in an airplane bathroom, and CSI only has a limited amount of time to find the killer before the passengers are released.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A powerful business consultant is killed during an unrelated street party, and the motive appears to be related to her missing flash drive, which contains incriminating information.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSI team investigates the death of a renowned archaeologist, Stella's life is put in danger over the archaeologist's possible discovery of a rare coin from ancient Greece.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Three drug dealers who are facing trial for killing a man are all shot and killed before their trial within minutes of each other.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crushed car, but the baby is missing. During the investigation, Danny finds out some shocking news about Lindsay.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armoured truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called Bermuda Triangle of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Det. Angel investigate the death of a pawn shop owner that reveals an old foe is back.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated deaths are tied together when CSI discovers that the victims were raped by the same man 8 years apart.

programme.desc: The death of a Ukrainian man helps CSI uncover a sex trafficking ring.

programme.desc: When the deputy mayor is killed, suspicion quickly falls on a sleazy newspaper publisher. Meanwhile, the "blue flu" could cause problems between Danny and the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab tackles a case involving a murdered Internet entrepreneur whose body has been picked apart by vultures.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, but things are complicated when they kill one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab makes a grisly discovery while investigating the death of a former Medical Examiner's wife, and Stella sets up a trap for the Greek coin thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder leads CSI to a group of white supremacists, the discovery of precious items stolen from Holocaust survivors, and perhaps the uncovering of a former Nazi guard.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labour, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a spray of machine gunfire, the CSI team rises from the chaos. But when one member's life is significantly changed, it proves to be the emotional motivation they need to piece together their lives and ultimately find the shooter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bodies are discovered at the North and South ends of the city, Mac and the team deftly begin to navigate the trail of evidence left behind by the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three state area.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an unidentified shooting victim turns out to be a rising star in the underground world of hip-hop dance battles, the CSIs turn their attention to a long list of rival dancers.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. Comedy drama, starring Jim Broadbent and Helen Mirren. The final film from Notting Hill director Roger Michell.

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: The first official feature documentary celebrating the incredible life of one of the most influential icons of the 20th Century, fashion designer Dame Mary Quant. Featuring contributions from Kate Moss, Vivienne Westwood, Edward Enninful, Dave Davies, Charlotte Tilbury, Jasper Conran and Zandra Rhodes as well as Mary’s family and peers.

programme.title: Set Fire to the Stars
programme.desc: Based on true events, Elijah Wood stars as John Malcolm Brinnin, the New York academic who brought Dylan Thomas to America. Actor/co-writer Celyn Jones plays the volatile celebrity poet – tormented by anonymity, alcohol and the abyss – who scandalized the Manhattan literati of the Fifties and challenged Brinnin’s hero worship of his work. In the face of the Welsh poet’s wilder excesses in the Big Apple – angel, beast and madman – John has no choice but to hijack Dylan to a private retreat to get him ready for America. The days and nights that follow will change his life forever. Part literary biopic and – shot in cut-glass black-and-white – part love-letter to the American B-movies of the Forties and Fifties, Andy Goddard’s debut feature is both a character driven chamber piece and a cautionary tale about the fly trap of meeting your heroes.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Rachel Weisz stars as Hester Collyer, who leads a privileged life in 1950's London as the beautiful wife of high court judge Sir William Collyer (Simon Russell Beale). To the shock of those around her, she walks out on her marriage to move in with dashing young ex-RAF pilot, Freddie Page (Tom Hiddleston), with whom she has fallen passionately in love. Set in post-war Britain, THE DEEP BLUE SEA is a study of forbidden love, suppressed desire, and the fear of loneliness but is at heart a deeply moving love story. Stuck between the devil and the deep blue sea, what - or whom - should Hester choose?

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. Comedy drama, starring Jim Broadbent and Helen Mirren. The final film from Notting Hill director Roger Michell.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job in a London church goes terribly wrong, hitmen Ray and Ken are ordered by boss Harry to lie low in the beautiful medieval city of Bruges.

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: The first official feature documentary celebrating the incredible life of one of the most influential icons of the 20th Century, fashion designer Dame Mary Quant. Featuring contributions from Kate Moss, Vivienne Westwood, Edward Enninful, Dave Davies, Charlotte Tilbury, Jasper Conran and Zandra Rhodes as well as Mary’s family and peers.

In the face of the Welsh poet’s wilder excesses in the Big Apple – angel, beast and madman – John has no choice but to hijack Dylan to a private retreat to get him ready for America. programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.

programme.title: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: Author Charles Dickens combines events from real-life with his extravagant imagination to create the unforgettable characters and scenes of 'The Christmas Carol', permanently altering the holiday season into the celebratory event we know today.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen star in Mike Leigh's Oscar and BAFTA-nominated comedy-drama about a contented couple and their less fortunate friends and family. Strong language.

programme.title: Love & Friendship
programme.desc: Based on the Jane Austen novella ‘Lady Susan’ set in the high society of the 1790s, acclaimed writer-director Whit Stillman’s film is an exquisitely witty and devious comedy of matchmaking and heartbreaking. Beautiful widow Lady Susan Vernon visits the estate of her in-laws to wait out the colorful rumors about her dalliances circulating through polite society. While ensconced there, she attracts the simultaneous attentions of the young, handsome Reginald DeCourcy, the rich and silly Sir James Martin, and the divinely attractive but married Lord Manwaring, complicating matters severely. But as always, Lady Susan has a plan. With a note-perfect ensemble cast, Love & Friendship is a fresh, disruptive, and frequently hilarious take on the traditional period drama. Featuring a revelatory turn from Kate Beckinsale as the duplicitous – but thoroughly charming – Lady Susan Vernon, here is the sharpest and wittiest Jane Austen adaptation to grace the screen.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following the armed seizure of the Iranian Embassy in London in April 1980, six tense days unfold as negotiations fail and fear grips the city. Inside, hostages endure uncertainty while outside, elite SAS commandos meticulously plan a daring rescue mission. The operation, executed with precision and bravery, becomes a defining moment in British military history, showcasing courage, discipline, and the power of swift, decisive action under extreme pressure.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.

programme.title: Anna And The Apocalypse
programme.desc: The night before Christmas, a zombie apocalypse threatens the sleepy town of Little Haven. Anna and her friends must fight, slash and sing their way to survival, facing hellish snowmen, an undead santa and bloodthirsty elves in a desperate race to reach their loved ones hiding out at their local high school. But the lucky few that make it find out that the human threat they face there is the most terrifying of all... With civilisation falling apart around them, the only people they can truly rely on are each other.

programme.title: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: Author Charles Dickens combines events from real-life with his extravagant imagination to create the unforgettable characters and scenes of 'The Christmas Carol', permanently altering the holiday season into the celebratory event we know today.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen star in Mike Leigh's Oscar and BAFTA-nominated comedy-drama about a contented couple and their less fortunate friends and family. Strong language.

Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.

programme.title: Churchill

Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up.

programme.title: Swimming With Men
programme.desc: Eric, an accountant in a full-blown mid-life crisis, joins an all-male synchronized swim team and slowly the ramshackle squad opens up to each other. But can they get their routines in sync in time to compete in Milan at the World Championship?

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: Intense and troubled Lydia and charismatic Abbie are best friends experiencing a sexual awakening at their strict English girls' school. Following a tragedy, a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out. As Lydia's symptoms worsen, she rallies against the school's authorities to uncover the underlying cause of the outbreak. Eventually her actions force old secrets to rise to the surface and she finds herself faced with a truth that she never expected.

programme.title: Swimming With Men
programme.desc: Eric, an accountant in a full-blown mid-life crisis, joins an all-male synchronized swim team and slowly the ramshackle squad opens up to each other. But can they get their routines in sync in time to compete in Milan at the World Championship?

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: One summer at a lakeside Russian estate, friends and family gather for a weekend in the countryside. While everyone is caught up in passionately loving someone who loves somebody else, a tragicomedy unfolds about art, fame, human folly, and the eternal desire to live a purposeful life. Aristocratic actress Irina (Annette Bening, 20th Century Women) pays summer visits to her brother Sorin (Brian Dennehy, First Blood) and her son Konstantin (Billy Howle, On Chesil Beach). On one occasion, her lover, the successful novelist Boris Trigorin (Corey Stoll, Midnight in Paris), accompanies her. When Nina (Saoirse Ronan, Lady Bird), a free and innocent girl who lives on a neighbouring estate, falls in love with Boris, he basks in her adulation, while Irina is shunned by Konstantin, who loves Nina. Based on Anton Chekhov’s classic play, 'The Seagull' explores, with comedy and melancholy, the obsessive nature of love, the tangled relationships between parents and children, and the transcendent value and psychic toll of art.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: Le Week-End is a beautifully observed and poignant story of a long-married British couple (Jim Broadbent and Lindsay Duncan) who return to Paris for the first time since their honeymoon to revitalize their marriage. While there, they run into an old friend (Goldblum) who transforms their thoughts on life and their love for one another. Directed by Roger Michell (Notting Hill).

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Western Front, March 18, 1918. With a massive German attack imminent, a company moves up for its 6-day spell on the line. The company is lead by the war-weary, tightly wound, alcoholic Captain Stanhope. Joining the company is 2nd Lieutenant Raleigh, fresh out of training. Raleigh knew Stanhope at school and asked to be assigned to his company. Little does he realize how much Stanhope has changed.

programme.title: Burn Burn Burn
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, two girls in their late twenties embark on a road trip to spread his ashes. Seph and Alex take turns driving. Dan is in the glove compartment, in tupperware, decreasing in volume as the trip progresses.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: One summer at a lakeside Russian estate, friends and family gather for a weekend in the countryside. While everyone is caught up in passionately loving someone who loves somebody else, a tragicomedy unfolds about art, fame, human folly, and the eternal desire to live a purposeful life. Aristocratic actress Irina (Annette Bening, 20th Century Women) pays summer visits to her brother Sorin (Brian Dennehy, First Blood) and her son Konstantin (Billy Howle, On Chesil Beach). Based on Anton Chekhov’s classic play, 'The Seagull' explores, with comedy and melancholy, the obsessive nature of love, the tangled relationships between parents and children, and the transcendent value and psychic toll of art.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom. Through Lady Rose's 'scripture', a life of extraordinary love and great injustice emerges, revealing a remarkable young woman of courage, whose only crime was to fall in love.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man of many talents arrives in a strange and haunted town on a mission to locate a stolen artefact for his menacing client, Fletcher finds himself entangled in a twilight world of vampires, sleeping beauties, Voodoo gangsters, noir private eyes, and masked avengers. Welcome to The Show.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet will collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is under way.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Raiders Of The Lost Ark
programme.desc: An archaeologist hears about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which could hold the key to humanly existence, but he will have to fight a band of Nazis for the lost treasure.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Temple Of Doom
programme.desc: Barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Last Crusade
programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Last Crusade
programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Out Of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Coming To America
programme.desc: In an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for an African Prince to find a princess. The mission leads him and his most loyal friend to New York.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin Hood decides to fight back as an outlaw when faced with the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin Hood decides to fight back as an outlaw when faced with the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.desc: A man meets a clone of himself and stumbles into a grand conspiracy about clones taking over the world.
